name: Kiro CLI
prerequisites: kiro-cli >=2.5.1 installed (Kiro CLI.app) and on PATH (e.g. /opt/homebrew/bin/kiro-cli symlink)
Logged in via `kiro-cli login` (subscription auth; no env var)
trust-all-tools consent persisted: run `kiro-cli chat --trust-all-tools` once and pick 'Yes, and don't ask again' (already done on this machine)
